title: HybridNode Configuration
description: Schema for hybridnode YAML configuration files. Stack: Holochain 0.6.1 (iroh, HDK 0.6.1) + QUIC/mTLS ed25519 (quinn 0.11) + SD-WAN.

mode.description: Operating mode. 'hybridnode' = all three layers active.

identity.description: Identity configuration. The ed25519 AgentPubKey serves as DHT identity, QUIC/mTLS certificate, and source-chain signer.

backend.description: Only 'holochain' is supported — keys live in lair-keystore.

keystore.description: Holochain lair-keystore. Never extract private keys.

holochain.description: Holochain 0.6.1 conductor settings. Uses iroh as default P2P transport.

conductor_url.description: WebSocket URL of the Holochain conductor (e.g. ws://localhost:8888).

app_port.description: Holochain app port for zome calls (default: 8889).

bootstrap_mode.description: Private: requires PrivateNetworkProof membrane proof at genesis.

bootstrap_url.description: Bootstrap server URL. For private networks: internal SD-WAN server.

network_seed.description: DNA network seed — must match across all nodes in the same mesh.

sdwan.description: SD-WAN underlay configuration. Provides topology, SLA metrics and QoS policies.

provider.description: SD-WAN controller type. Use 'mock' for development/CI.

api_token_env.description: Environment variable holding the SD-WAN API token.

site_id_env.description: Environment variable holding this node's site ID.

tls_verify.description: Verify TLS certificate of SD-WAN controller. Never set to false in production.

poll_interval_seconds.description: How often to poll SD-WAN for topology updates.

max_latency_ms.description: Maximum acceptable RTT for each link class.

min_bandwidth_mbps.description: Minimum bandwidth for each link class.

quic.description: QUIC/mTLS data plane. ed25519 AgentPubKey is reused as TLS certificate. PeerKeyVerifier enforces mutual authentication.

mtls_strict.description: ALWAYS true — activates PeerKeyVerifier. Setting false disables peer verification and is forbidden in production.

bind_addr.description: Local address to bind for QUIC connections.

relay_fallback.description: Fall back to iroh relay if direct QUIC fails.

dscp_marking.description: DSCP value for inference traffic. 46 = EF (Expedited Forwarding).

threshold_gbps.description: Above this bandwidth, skip compression (already fast enough).

max_activation_size_mb.description: Maximum activation blob size in MB per transfer.

default_strategy.description: local_first: prefer same SD-WAN site; fall back to remote only if SLA allows.

max_inter_site_activation_mb.description: Refuse to route activations larger than this over inter-site links.

max_nodes_per_plan.description: Maximum nodes in a single inference plan.

mode.description: none=single node; primary_shadow=shadow copy; hot_standby=failover; n_of_m_quorum=consensus; speculative_verify=draft+verify.

quorum_m.description: For n_of_m_quorum: total nodes to query.

gguf_paths.description: Directories to scan for GGUF model files.

metrics_port.description: Prometheus scrape port. Also exposed at /metrics.

prometheus.description: Enable Prometheus scrape endpoint at metrics_port/metrics.

otel_endpoint.description: OpenTelemetry OTLP endpoint (e.g. http://otel-collector:4317). Empty = disabled.

sdwan_metrics.description: Include SD-WAN link metrics in NodeObservabilitySnapshot DHT entries.

audit.description: Automated audit configuration (mirrors ainonymous audit node/model CLI).

auto_warrant.description: Automatically publish a Warrant when a peer fails audit checks.

reputation_threshold.description: Peers below this score are excluded from scheduling. Formula: (success_rate×0.4)+(speed×0.3)+(age×0.2)-(warrant_penalty×0.1).

private_network.description: Require PrivateNetworkProof membrane proof at genesis. Enables genesis_self_check with feature private-network.

pow_difficulty.description: Anti-Sybil PoW difficulty at admission. 0 = disabled (only suitable for private networks).

warrant_expiry_days.description: Warrants expire after this many days (Holochain DHT link TTL).
